headline: JB-Singapore RTS Link Construction Passes 55% Complete
context: Johor Bahru-Singapore RTS Link reached 55% construction in February 2026 with 4km cross-border line targeting 2027.

cards.big: JB-Singapore RTS Link is 55% complete targeting 2027 opening
cards.sub: 4km cross-border rail will carry 10,000 passengers per hour each direction

cards.big: Project cost finalized at RM10 billion shared 50-50 between Malaysia and Singapore
cards.sub: Malaysian portion funded through federal allocation and Johor state bonds

cards.big: CIQ facility in Bukit Chagar will process 60,000 daily commuters at capacity
cards.sub: Customs clearance target of 3 minutes versus current 45-minute Causeway wait

cards.big: Property prices within 1km of station rose 35% since 2023
cards.sub: Speculation pushed affordable housing out of reach for local JB residents

cards.big: RTS construction tests whether cross-border transit also addresses housing displacement
55% complete — JB-Singapore RTS link will test whether cross-border rail can reshape commuter patterns.
